message:
feat(connectors): add ConnectorRuntime and HttpRetryConfig to all connector clients

Equip every connector client with a ConnectorRuntime (request context +
deadline management) and an HttpRetryConfig, establishing the V3 runtime
contract. For ~75 connectors that previously had no retry infrastructure,
this adds the fields and a shutdown() method. For ~9 connectors with
hand-rolled retry loops (github, slack, stripe, google-calendar,
anthropic, etc.), this replaces ad-hoc sleep-based backoff with
RetryLoop::execute(), removing manual sleep imports and consolidating
retry configuration into HttpRetryConfig.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
